hypothesis: A single-agent pipeline that combines structured PDF-to-markdown extraction, GPT-4o image captioning, and LLM-based information extraction will achieve higher precision, recall, and F1 for end-to-end chemical information extraction and better output-format compliance than baseline GPT-5/GPT-5 Thinking and general-purpose ChatGPT Agent, and will perform comparably to or better than domain-specific multi-agent systems on the ChemX nanozyme and chelate datasets.
